what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 outline SVG icon showing a cloud with an upward upload arrow.
observations: The SVG uses a 24 by 24 viewBox with matching width and height attributes.
Rendering is outline-based with fill="none", stroke="currentColor", stroke-width="1.5", and rounded caps and joins.
One path draws the cloud outline and one path draws the vertical arrow with chevron head.
standouts: The icon is themeable through currentColor.
The cloud and upload arrow are separated into two path elements.
conventions: Uses common inline SVG icon attributes for scalable outline icons.
Encodes all visible geometry as path data.
Keeps the asset self-contained with no external references.
concerns: No title or desc element is present for standalone accessibility metadata.
The SVG is compressed onto one line, which reduces manual readability.
notes: A compact themeable outline cloud-upload icon asset.
questions: Should accessible labeling be provided inside this SVG or by the consuming UI?
Is the 1.5 stroke width intentional for this asset?
purpose_vs_actual: The file name suggests a cloud upload icon, and the SVG content depicts a cloud with an upward upload arrow.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable cloud-upload symbol that inherits color from surrounding UI text or icon styling.
contribution: Contributes a compact currentColor SVG representation of a cloud upload action, with separate cloud and arrow path geometry suitable for reuse in an icon system.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor outline SVG icon depicting a cloud with an upward upload arrow.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for representing a cloud upload action as a reusable themeable vector icon.
